context: Hard: timing attack in HMAC signature comparison

checklist.name: Catches timing attack vulnerability
checklist.description: Identifies that the webhook signature comparison uses == (string equality) instead of hmac.compare_digest() or equivalent constant-time comparison, making it vulnerable to timing attacks

checklist.name: Risk classified yellow or higher
checklist.description: PR is classified as yellow or higher — it adds security-sensitive signature verification logic

checklist.name: Does not raise irrelevant findings
checklist.description: Does not raise more than one false positive finding unrelated to the actual vulnerability
